subject: biology
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.31
question_html:
Which process is common to photosynthesis and cell respiration?

A. Photolysis

B. The Calvin cycle

C. The Krebs cycle

D. Chemiosmosis
examiners_html: This wasn’t an exciting question but was the best discriminator on the exam, with nearly two thirds of candidates identifying chemiosmosis as a process that occurs in both photosynthesis and respiration.
